feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Express document "Update was canceled" received from author "USER" (SOLVED)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I have the following problem, in tcode VA01 I create the sales order and save it, the message indicating the generated number of the saved order is displayed, when I change screens the message below is displayed:

In tcode ST22 generates a dump with the message VH 535 below related to the error

I've already investigated my pricing but I haven't identified any duplicate conditions, please guys, help me!

 

------------------------------------------------------

Sirs, the problem was in the invoice-to-order copy control, in the formula that copies the VBAP data. After changing the standard formula, the problem was solved.

entry.title: VL10E to create delivery separately
entry.content: Hi All,I use VL10E to create delivery from Schedule agreement. I proceed a creation of deliveries with selected items(multiple) with one delivery from background button at this moment. but I proceed a creation of deliveries with one item one delivery separately. Do you have a any idea?

entry.title: Exclude blocked (or marked for deletion) customers from appearing in future transactions
entry.content:
Dears,
The case is that I have a customer who has a lot of Ship-to assigned, and I need to block/delete a few of them so they are not visible when processing (new) Sales orders.

I blocked them and marked them for deletion (using XD05 and XD06 for all areas, etc.), but when creating a Sales order, I still see them in the 'Partner selection' pop-up when choosing the Ship-to address for that customer. The correct error message appears when I select one of them ("There is an order block for customer..."), but they are still visible on the list, which causes confusion for other users.

How can I process these customers/Ship-to to exclude them from being visible in future sales documents?
(SAP ECC 6.0 Enh Pack 5)

P.S. I know there is an available transaction to completely remove customers (OBR2), but this should be a last resort, used only if there are no other options and no open transactions.

Reagrds
Krzysztof

entry.title: Billing Request (DP90) Reference to Service Order: Zero Net Value on Service Product line item
entry.content:
When we generate Billing Request using DP90 with reference to Service order, we found a scenario where Service material/product Net value become "0" by adding custom Condition type with 100 % Discount which is copying from Non Billable below line items automatically.

Scenario's: 

1. If the line item (20, 30 etc) under the Service product line item(10) are with Net value "0" means those are Non billable items and Discount pricing condition type(YKBM) is applicable to it, then same Discount condition is setting up to Service product and Net value become "0"

2. If one of the Secondary line items are Billable then the Service produce(line item 10) Net value become Base price and no Discount condition type is copying to line item 10(Service product).

Experts please help us whether this functionality is standard or do we need to configure anything to make correction of this functionality by changing like Flat rate for line item 10 with service product will never be "0" even though the other line items are all zero

entry.title: RAP event trigger via SAP GUI tcode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on to consume RAP event from sales order creation. As per requirement, standard event should trigger from sales order creation via EML, Sales order app and SAP GUI related tcode(VA01) as well.

As far as I know RAP event doesn't trigger from SAP GUI tcode. Can anyone help here if there is any way to trigger standard rap event from SAP GUI tcode VA01 ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: Approval Strategy for Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SCN's

I need your help. The customer has a requirement: if a sales order has a discount of 9% or less, a 1-step approval strategy should be applied to the order. If a sales order has a discount of more than 9%, a 2-step approval strategy should be applied to the order. Is it possible to implement a Sales Order approval strategy according to this requirement and how?

 

SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: express document "update was cancelled" error
entry.content: While doing PGI and reverse PGI we are getting this error. Can someone please tell how to fix this?

entry.title: Period of time in SD order item
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

 

is there any way to maintain a time period in which a sold service is provisioned?

 

I.e. we create an order item for a service fee from June 15th to July 10th. Is there a standard way to store these dates in the item and later print them on the invoice?

 

Cheers

Jens

entry.title: Erro:No form was assigned to case type FDCA and procedure B2B-EXIST. About Credit DCD
entry.content:
Dear All,

My sales orders are showing up in VKM* transaction codes, but they are not visible in UKM_MY_DCDS. Therefore, I used the transaction code UKM_DCD_SETUP_CHECK to check the configuration. There were three error messages. Could you please advise me on how to configure it correctly?

entry.title: Key Tables
entry.content:
Dear All,

Please let me know where I can find ALL the Tables for FI, CO, MM, SD, PP, & QM? I have access to the Partner portal.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP SD report for customer who is also Payee in customer master
entry.content:
Dear SAP Guru,

Please help me . I want to make one single excel for below details in SAP SD:

Customer code

Customer Name

Payee (Partner Role) who has code same as customer number. Payee is same as Customer

Place

Pin code

deletion flag

billing block

Payment terms as per Customer master

Payment Terms description present in customer master

I want to use SVQI .Which tables i need to join to get all above results .

Please guide

Thank you

 

BR

SAP SCM

entry.title: Retention Amount in Sales Order Showing with VAT in Manage Customer Line item– Require Exclusion VAT
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are using Payment Terms as a workaround to manage Retention Amounts in Sales Orders within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, we have observed a discrepancy in how the retention is displayed in the Manage Customer Line-Item app.

In the Manage Customer Line-Item app

  • The retention amount appears in a separate line, which is expected.

  • However, both the main amount and the retention amount include VAT, which results in a total VAT value that is not aligned with our requirement.

Business Requirement:

  • Retention amount should be displayed without VAT.
  • VAT should only be applied to the net payable amount, excluding the retention until it's due.

Request:

 

We would like to know:

  1. Is there a standard configuration or best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to exclude VAT from the retention line?
  2. Can retention amount be excluded from VAT calculation or shown separately in reporting?

 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: We cannot assign separate number ranges to different plants in the subcontracting challan
entry.content:
We have created a number range prefix DCH for subcontracting challans in SAP Cloud, using billing type JSN. We now need to set separate number range for 8 different plants.

Is this possible? If so, could you please suggest the relevant BAdI name?

We have tried using the SD_BIL_FLEX_NUMBERING BAdI, but it is not working. We are using the Create Subcontracting Challan – India application to create subcontracting challans.

entry.title: While releasing the sales order
entry.content:
While releasing the sales order the price would be changing in sales order(vkm3)

can any one help out on this

entry.title: Sales order header text to billing doc. header text not copied.
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have requirement to copy text from sales order header to billing document header. For now there is configuration in VOTXN. Problem is that it copies from SO header to billing item not sure why. I need this in header.

Furthermore in billing document i have got below log message that text could be obtained .

But it is not done automatically . There is not any text in header level copied.

 

Not sure what should be checked.

Thank you.

entry.title: Restriction of material sale in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is it possible to restrict sale of material for more customers at once, not one by one?

Thank you in advance,

Marina

entry.title: Creation of custom CDS view in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

How to create custom CDS view joining 3 data sources ( I_SalesOrderItemCube, I_DeliveryDocumentItem I_CustomerReturnItemCube_2) and avoid multiple lines in final report? Another question is how to convert currency directly in CDS?

Thank you in advance,

Marina

entry.title: Multiple Billing Document Attachments in Single Email Transmission
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Is it possible to group multiple Billing Documents (PDF Attachments) for the same customer in a single email output transmission?

entry.title: Configuration of Dynamic Sender Email in Output Parameter Determination_Billing Documents
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

As part of the process for sending billing documents to customers, we would like to configure the sender's email address based on the Company Code/Sales Organization issuing the billing document.

In the "Email Settings" step within the "Output Parameter Determination" application, we are currently unable to set a dynamic email address that varies according to the sending Company Code/Sales Organization 

With the current configuration, a single default email address is used for all Company Codes and Sales Organizations, and there is no option to define dynamic email addresses.

Can we achieve this requirement by implementing a Business Add-In (BAdI) ? If possible, could you please help us identify the appropriate BAdI and how to proceed ? 

Thank you for your help. 

Best regards,

entry.title: Limit sales order partner function number - taken only from customer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've got a question regarding Partner functions: I want to limit the partner function number possible list to be taken from customer.

Example partner function CP - contact person. Current setting (I've added origin E, but it's not working as I thought, previously it was empty):

Currently I only have 1 contact person assigned to this customer:

And this number is assigned as default to the sales order in order header -> partner tab:

Yet I can go and change this number to another one and save such sales order:

Is there a standard configuration to block such action and allow only numbers that are assigned to the customer?
